name: --path
-p
options.description: Path to a sub-directory in which to look for a preset

name: --tag
-t
options.description: Branch or tag to use if the preset is a repository

options.name: --no-ssh
options.description: Do not use SSH when cloning repositories

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not use the cached repository if it exists

options.name: --debug
options.description: Display debug information instead of standard output

args.name: resolvable
args.description: Repository identifier or path to the preset

args.name: target-directory
args.description: Directory in which to apply the preset
